task: requote_uri in utils.py defines two nearly identical safe-character constants. Deduplicate them.
correctness_argument: Defining `safe_without_percent` first and deriving `safe_with_percent` by appending `'%'` removes the literal duplication while keeping the crucial distinction. The main quoting path still includes `'%'` in its safe set, so already-encoded sequences are never double-encoded.
